raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hrs,
    ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS min_resolution_hrs,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS max_resolution_hrs,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS median_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL AND state = 'Closed'
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY avg_resolution_hrs DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total_incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_resolution_hrs,
    ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS min_resolution_hrs,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS max_resolution_hrs,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS median_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL AND state = ?s
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY avg_resolution_hrs DESC;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (state = 'Closed'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < 0) AS negative_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600 > 500) AS extreme_high_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) >= 0)::numeric, 2) AS avg_positive_only_hrs,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM flag_6
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL AND state = 'Closed'
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY avg_positive_only_hrs DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < ?n) AS negative_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n > ?n) AS extreme_high_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) >= ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_positive_only_hrs,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM flag_6
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL AND state = ?s
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY avg_positive_only_hrs DESC;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (state = 'Closed'::text))

    assigned_to,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6

GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('month', opened_at)
ORDER BY assigned_to, month;

raw_sql:

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', opened_at) AS quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL AND state = 'Closed'
    AND assigned_to != 'Fred Luddy'
GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', opened_at)
ORDER BY assigned_to, quarter;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL AND state = ?s
    AND assigned_to != ?s
GROUP BY assigned_to, DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at)
ORDER BY assigned_to, quarter;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (assigned_to <> 'Fred Luddy'::text) AND (state = 'Closed'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', opened_at) AS quarter,
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents_assigned,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT priority, ', ' ORDER BY priority) AS priorities_seen
FROM flag_6
WHERE state = 'Closed' AND assigned_to = 'Fred Luddy'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('quarter', opened_at), assigned_to
ORDER BY quarter;
template:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at) AS quarter,
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents_assigned,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT priority, ?s ORDER BY priority) AS priorities_seen
FROM flag_6
WHERE state = ?s AND assigned_to = ?s
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, opened_at), assigned_to
ORDER BY quarter;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assignment_group,
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE state = 'Closed' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND assignment_group IN ('Network', 'Database', 'Software')
GROUP BY assignment_group, assigned_to
ORDER BY assignment_group, avg_resolution_hrs DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    assignment_group,
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS incidents,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE state = ?s AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND opened_at IS NOT NULL
    AND assignment_group IN (?s, ?s, ?s)
GROUP BY assignment_group, assigned_to
ORDER BY assignment_group, avg_resolution_hrs DESC;

predicates: ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (state = 'Closed'::text) AND (assignment_group = ANY ('{Network,Database,Software}'::text[])))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    state,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(closed_at, NOW()) - opened_at))/3600)::numeric, 2) AS avg_age_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to, state
ORDER BY assigned_to, state;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    state,
    COUNT(*) AS incident_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(closed_at, NOW()) - opened_at))/?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_age_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE opened_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY assigned_to, state
ORDER BY assigned_to, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    number,
    priority,
    category,
    assignment_group,
    opened_at,
    state,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - opened_at))/3600::numeric, 2) AS age_hrs,
    CASE WHEN closed_at IS NOT NULL 
         THEN ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600::numeric, 2) 
         END AS resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE (state = 'In Progress') 
   OR (closed_at IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < 0)
ORDER BY assigned_to, state, opened_at;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    number,
    priority,
    category,
    assignment_group,
    opened_at,
    state,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - opened_at))/?n::numeric, ?n) AS age_hrs,
    CASE WHEN closed_at IS NOT NULL 
         THEN ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n::numeric, ?n) 
         END AS resolution_hrs
FROM flag_6
WHERE (state = ?s) 
   OR (closed_at IS NOT NULL AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < ?n)
ORDER BY assigned_to, state, opened_at;

predicates: ((state = 'In Progress'::text) OR ((closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < '0'::numeric)))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < 0) AS negative_time_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < 0) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_bad_data,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) >= 0)::numeric, 2) AS clean_avg_hrs,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/3600) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) >= 0)::numeric, 2) AS clean_median_hrs,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress') AS open_in_progress
FROM flag_6
WHERE opened_at IS NOT NULL AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND state IN ('Closed', 'Resolved', 'In Progress')
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY clean_avg_hrs DESC NULLS LAST;
template:
SELECT 
    assigned_to,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < ?n) AS negative_time_count,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) < ?n) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_bad_data,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) >= ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS clean_avg_hrs,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at))/?n) FILTER (WHERE EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - opened_at)) >= ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS clean_median_hrs,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS open_in_progress
FROM flag_6
WHERE opened_at IS NOT NULL AND closed_at IS NOT NULL AND state IN (?s, ?s, ?s)
GROUP BY assigned_to
ORDER BY clean_avg_hrs DESC NULLS LAST;

predicates: ((opened_at IS NOT NULL) AND (closed_at IS NOT NULL) AND (state = ANY ('{Closed,Resolved,"In Progress"}'::text[])))
